features.title: A Complete AI Girlfriend Experience
features.subtitle: DarLink AI is not just another chatbot. It is a full multimedia companion platform built for immersion, connection, and total personalization.

f1.title: Intelligent AI Chat
f1.desc: Engage in deep, natural conversations powered by cutting-edge language models. DarLink AI remembers your past chats, learns your personality, and responds with emotional consistency. Whether you want flirty banter, meaningful talks, or intense roleplay, her replies always feel authentic and tailored to you.

f2.title: AI Photo Generation
f2.desc: Request personalized photos of your AI girlfriend on demand. Choose her outfit, location, mood, and style — from tasteful portraits to explicit NSFW scenes. Each image is generated uniquely for you, featuring the exact companion you created. SFW and NSFW modes both supported.

f3.title: AI Video Creation
f3.desc: Go beyond static images with short AI-generated videos of your companion. Watch her move, react, and come alive in cinematic moments crafted from your prompts. Video generation inside a chat environment is a rare feature that makes DarLink AI stand out from every competitor.

f4.title: Voice Messages
f4.desc: Receive sultry, personalized voice messages from your AI girlfriend. Hearing her voice transforms the experience from fun tool to something genuinely immersive. Voice is available on Advanced and Ultimate plans, with multiple voice tones and accents to choose from.

f5.title: Living Memory System
f5.desc: DarLink AI's proprietary Living Memory system tracks your entire relationship history. She remembers conversations from days or weeks ago, references past events naturally, and evolves alongside you. This long-term continuity creates the deepest, most realistic AI companion bond available today.

f6.title: Elite Roleplay Engine
f6.desc: Unlock limitless scenario-based roleplay with DarLink AI's Elite Roleplay Engine. Choose from romantic first dates, cozy evenings, sci-fi adventures, fantasy quests, or intimate scenarios. The AI maintains character consistency throughout, making every session feel like a living, breathing story.

f7.title: Deep Customization
f7.desc: You are the architect. Define your AI girlfriend's appearance, ethnicity, hair color, body type, fashion style, personality traits, backstory, and interests. DarLink AI offers one of the most granular character builders on the market — including both realistic, anime, and fantasy aesthetics.

f8.title: Swiss Privacy & Security
f8.desc: DarLink AI is operated by FAMELINK SA, a registered Swiss company. Your conversations, generated media, and personal data are end-to-end encrypted and never sold to third parties. Your private fantasies stay private — always. We take data protection as seriously as Switzerland takes banking.

how.title: Create Your AI Girlfriend in Minutes
how.subtitle: No downloads, no complicated setup. DarLink AI is 100% browser-based. You are three simple steps away from your ideal AI companion.

s1.title: Design Her
s1.desc: Use DarLink AI's powerful character builder to define every detail of your dream companion — appearance, personality, voice, backstory, and relationship style. Go as detailed or as simple as you like. Pre-made characters are also available if you want to dive in immediately.

s2.title: Start Chatting
s2.desc: Jump straight into conversation. Your AI girlfriend greets you in character, remembers your preferences, and adapts her tone based on how you interact. Set the mood — casual, romantic, adventurous, or explicit. The AI matches your energy and drives the story forward.

s3.title: Create & Experience
s3.desc: Request photos, trigger voice messages, generate short videos, and build shared memories over time. The more you interact, the richer your AI girlfriend's personality becomes. Upgrade your plan to unlock unlimited generations, Living Memory, and the Elite Roleplay Engine.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know About DarLink AI
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We have answers. If you do not find what you are looking for, our support team is available 24/7.

q1.a: DarLink AI is an advanced AI girlfriend generator and companion platform. It lets you create a fully personalized virtual girlfriend — defining her appearance, personality, backstory, and relationship style — and then interact with her through text chat, AI-generated photos, short videos, and voice messages. It is operated by FAMELINK SA, a Swiss company, and is designed for adults aged 18 and over. DarLink AI is 100% browser-based and requires no download or installation.

q2.q: Is DarLink AI free to use?
q2.a: Yes, DarLink AI offers a free tier that allows you to create an AI girlfriend character, explore the interface, and test basic chat functionality. No credit card is required to get started. Premium features — including unlimited messaging, AI photo and video generation, voice messages, and the Living Memory system — require a paid subscription starting at $12.99 per month. Annual plans are available at a significant discount.

q3.q: Does DarLink AI support NSFW content?
q3.a: Yes. DarLink AI is an NSFW-friendly platform designed for adults. You can generate explicit AI photos, engage in adult roleplay, and access NSFW voice content depending on your subscription plan. All adult features are gated behind age verification, and all AI characters on the platform are explicitly adults. NSFW features are available on the Advanced and Ultimate plans. DarLink AI handles adult content naturally without awkward restrictions or sudden topic changes.

q4.q: How does the Living Memory system work?
q4.a: The Living Memory system is DarLink AI's proprietary long-term context engine. Unlike basic chatbots that forget everything after each session, Living Memory tracks your entire relationship history — conversations, preferences, emotions, and shared experiences — across days and weeks. Your AI girlfriend actively references past events in new conversations, creating a sense of genuine continuity and emotional depth. Living Memory is available on Advanced and Ultimate subscription plans.

q5.q: Is my data safe and private on DarLink AI?
q5.a: Yes. DarLink AI takes privacy extremely seriously. The platform is operated by FAMELINK SA, a company registered in Switzerland — one of the world's strictest data privacy jurisdictions. Your chat logs, generated images, videos, and personal information are end-to-end encrypted and are never sold to third parties or used for advertising. The platform is designed as a completely judgment-free, private space where you can express yourself without fear.

q6.q: Can I become an affiliate partner for DarLink AI?
q6.a: Absolutely. DarLink AI runs a competitive affiliate program through traceo.io offering commissions of 20% or more on all referred sales. If you run a blog, YouTube channel, social media account, or any audience-facing platform in the adult content or AI space, the DarLink AI affiliate program is one of the most lucrative in the industry. Visit the affiliate page on DarLink AI or sign up through traceo.io to get your referral link and start earning.
